name: aiinsights
title: AI Insights Widget
description: The dashboard's AI Insights feed renderer. A declarative mount (data-widget="aiinsights") is filled by the OOW.aiinsights renderer with a role="list" column of compact insight cards. Each card carries a coloured severity rail on its left edge, an uppercase "kind" label (anomaly / forecast / root cause / noise) tinted by its own category colour, a right-aligned mono confidence read-out, a bold title and a muted one-line description. The renderer emits structure only; the severity rail (--ins-sev) and kind tint (--ins-kc) are injected inline as var(--token) references, so aiinsights.css owns all presentation and nothing hardcodes palette hex. Confidence percentages are the only seed-driven data, so output is deterministic and renders identically every load. Rows lift on hover, expose a keyboard focus ring when made interactive for drill-down (rendered as button/link), and an aria-disabled feed dims the whole set for no-data / loading. Depends on the shared rng / esc utils with small local fallbacks.
